posts.text: Recent crises have shown how easily the global trading system can be thrown into chaos. A desire to reduce dependence on chokepoints is only natural. But rushing to build infrastructure is likely to result in huge inefficiencies https://www.economist.com/international/2026/04/30/the-global-scramble-for-ports?taid=69f70e9516d544000169ad49&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
